User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account registration representing buyer accounts identified by phone number

fullName.description: The full name of the registered customer

phoneNumber.description: The primary mobile number format of the customer

address.description: Standard delivery address details in Bangladesh

city.description: The target delivery city inside Bangladesh

createdAt.description: The timestamp when this user was registered

Order.title: Customer Order
Order.description: Order submitted by the client, tracking payment, items, and shipping status

id.description: Standard tracking ID starting with ORD-

items.description: All order items allocated within bag

promoApplied.description: The promo coupon code applied if any

paymentMethod.description: COD, Card or bKash / Nagad / Rocket wallets

orderStatus.description: Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered or Cancelled

date.description: Timestamp when the order was registered

userId.description: The UID associated with the auto-signed-in user

/users/{userId}.description: Provides customer authentication account records mapped to their phone UIDs

/orders/{orderId}.description: Individual order entities made by customers
